Security tip: Recommended Study Timeline

Plan for approximately 4-6 weeks of dedicated study. Here is a suggested weekly breakdown: Week 1: Cloud Concepts: IaaS/PaaS/SaaS, deployment models, cloud benefits Week 2: Azure Services: Compute, ne...

- Week 1: Cloud Concepts: IaaS/PaaS/SaaS, deployment models, cloud benefits
- Week 2: Azure Services: Compute, networking, storage, identity/security
- Week 3: Azure Management: Cost management, governance, compliance tools
- Week 4: Full Review: Practice exams, Azure portal walkthrough, weak areas
